name: The Mulligans Golf Club
address: 37-04 Queens Blvd, Long Island City, NY 11101
about: The Mulligans Golf Club is a golf simulator venue that combines advanced technology with an upscale social atmosphere. It features Trackman simulators, craft cocktails, and elevated food offerings, catering to players who value both performance and post-play socialization. The venue offers memberships with benefits like unlimited off-peak play and discounts, along with leagues, coaching, and event hosting capabilities for both individuals and groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Trackman technology providing precise shot data
Upscale lounge with full bar for socializing after play
PGA-level coaching available for all skill levels
Leagues and events with competitive formats and prizes
Membership options include free simulator hours and discounts

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated bites and gourmet food options available
Craft cocktails and full bar service

simulator_hardware.notes: 8 Trackman simulators with access to world-famous courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but it's common practice at simulator venues to provide clubs or allow players to bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers its own food and craft cocktails, but whether outside food/drinks are allowed isn't specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical simulator play for 18 holes ranges from 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly mention child-friendly features or age restrictions.
